body_txt: When a creature or species essentially comes into the world in an adult body. This may result from the creature having been deliberately created by someone else, or it just may be the way their species works. A given for robots (aside from the occasional Robot Kid ), as they are not technically "born", they are built. If the character is lucky, they will be born with the sufficient skills to survive in the world. If not, the character is probably in for a very rough and awkward time. Such a character is potentially subject to Merlin Sickness — being born old but then proceeding to age backwards. It's also possible that the character Really Was Born Yesterday . Sub-Trope of Younger Than They Look and Our Clones Are Different . Contrast with Physically Younger Clone .
